en.name: Suguru
en.desc: Fill regions with unique adjacent numbers!
en.description: Suguru is a number placement puzzle where you fill regions with digits. Each region's size determines which numbers to use (a 4-cell region needs 1-4). The key rule: no two adjacent cells (including diagonally!) can contain the same number. A fresh twist on number logic!
en.objectives: Fill each region with numbers 1 through its size, ensuring no adjacent cells (orthogonally or diagonally) share the same number.
en.howToPlay: Fill each region with numbers 1 through its size. Identical numbers cannot be adjacent (including diagonally). Use logic to deduce each cell's value.

rules.controls: Click a cell and enter a number from 1 to the region's size. Each region must contain all numbers from 1 to its size exactly once.
mechanics: Each region must contain numbers 1 through its size
No two adjacent cells can have the same number
Adjacency includes all 8 neighboring cells (diagonals count!)

tips: Look for cells that can only be one number
Use elimination based on adjacent numbers
Check all 8 neighbors when placing numbers

faq.question: How is Suguru different from Sudoku?
faq.answer: Suguru has irregular regions instead of 3×3 boxes, and most importantly, diagonal adjacency matters! Two cells touching diagonally cannot have the same number.

faq.question: What does region size mean?
faq.answer: A region with 3 cells must contain numbers 1, 2, and 3 exactly once each. The region size determines the number range.

faq.question: Why do diagonals matter?
faq.answer: Unlike Sudoku, Suguru considers all 8 neighbors around a cell. This means corner-adjacent cells also cannot share the same number.

faq.question: What's the best starting strategy?
faq.answer: Find single-cell regions first (they must be 1). Then look for cells surrounded by different numbers that force a specific value.

zh.name: 数独组
zh.desc: 用唯一相邻数字填充区域！
zh.description: 数独组是一个数字放置谜题，用数字填充区域。每个区域的大小决定使用哪些数字（4格区域需要1-4）。关键规则：没有两个相邻格子（包括对角线！）可以包含相同的数字。数字逻辑的新变化！
zh.objectives: 用数字1到区域大小填充每个区域，确保没有相邻格子（正交或对角线）共享相同的数字。
zh.howToPlay: 在格子里填入数字。每个区域必须包含该区域大小的数字（例如，4格区域需要1-4）。相邻格子（包括对角线）不能有相同数字。

rules.controls: 点击格子输入1到区域大小的数字。每个区域必须恰好包含1到其大小的所有数字一次。
mechanics: 每个区域必须包含1到其大小的数字
没有两个相邻格子可以有相同数字
相邻包括所有8个相邻格子（对角线也算！）

tips: 寻找填满最多数字的行或列
对角线相邻也适用于此谜题
使用排除法缩小可能数

faq.question: 数独组与数独有什么不同？
faq.answer: 数独组有不规则区域而不是3×3宫格，最重要的是对角线相邻也很重要！对角线接触的两个格子不能有相同数字。

faq.question: 区域大小是什么意思？
faq.answer: 有3个格子的区域必须恰好包含数字1、2和3各一次。区域大小决定数字范围。
